comments.body:
I have opened an issue with upstream go-md2man package
https://github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/issues/34
It looks like it does not like the way we are doing tables.
This is fine for now, but I would like to revert these once this bug gets fixed.

@rhatdan Okay, I will open an issue to keep track of this.
Can we get this in for now, so we can test other PRs?

:pushpin: Commit 9cc3e83 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 9cc3e8392f17247b00f66f51e52726d7d00d452e -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
